script:
import sys
from awsglue.transforms import *
from awsglue.utils import getResolvedOptions
from pyspark.context import SparkContext
from awsglue.context import GlueContext
from awsglue.job import Job
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import *
from datetime import datetime

# Get job parameters
args = getResolvedOptions(sys.argv, [
    'JOB_NAME',
    'BRONZE_PATH',
    'SILVER_PATH',
    'CHECKPOINT_PATH'
])

# Initialize Glue Context
sc = SparkContext()
glueContext = GlueContext(sc)
spark = glueContext.spark_session
job = Job(glueContext)
job.init(args['JOB_NAME'], args)

print("=" * 80)
print("Glue Streaming Job: Traffic Bronze → Silver")
print("=" * 80)

# Configuration from job parameters
BRONZE_PATH = args['BRONZE_PATH']
SILVER_PATH = args['SILVER_PATH']
CHECKPOINT_PATH = args['CHECKPOINT_PATH']

print(f"Bronze: {BRONZE_PATH}")
print(f"Silver: {SILVER_PATH}")
print(f"Checkpoint: {CHECKPOINT_PATH}")

# Define Schema
traffic_schema = StructType([
    StructField("sensor_id", StringType(), True),
    StructField("timestamp", StringType(), True),
    StructField("event_id", StringType(), True),
    StructField("sensor_type", StringType(), True),
    
    StructField("location", StructType([
        StructField("lat", DoubleType(), True),
        StructField("lon", DoubleType(), True),
        StructField("intersection", StringType(), True),
        StructField("road_type", StringType(), True),
        StructField("city", StringType(), True),
        StructField("country", StringType(), True)
    ]), True),
    
    StructField("measurements", StructType([
        StructField("vehicle_count", IntegerType(), True),
        StructField("avg_speed_mph", DoubleType(), True),
        StructField("congestion_level", StringType(), True),
        StructField("pedestrian_count", IntegerType(), True),
        StructField("bike_count", IntegerType(), True),
        StructField("occupancy_percent", DoubleType(), True),
        StructField("queue_length_meters", DoubleType(), True)
    ]), True),
    
    StructField("traffic_flow_score", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("incident_detected", BooleanType(), True),
    
    StructField("metadata", StructType([
        StructField("device_status", StringType(), True),
        StructField("signal_strength", IntegerType(), True),
        StructField("firmware_version", StringType(), True)
    ]), True),
    
    StructField("partition_year", StringType(), True),
    StructField("partition_month", StringType(), True),
    StructField("partition_day", StringType(), True),
    StructField("partition_hour", StringType(), True),
    
    StructField("created_at", StringType(), True),
    StructField("data_source", StringType(), True),
    StructField("ingestion_type", StringType(), True)
])

# Read Streaming Data from Bronze
print("Reading Bronze streaming data...")
bronze_stream = spark.readStream \
    .format("json") \
    .schema(traffic_schema) \
    .option("maxFilesPerTrigger", 10) \
    .option("compression", "gzip") \
    .load(BRONZE_PATH)

print("✓ Bronze stream initialized")

# Transform to Silver Schema
print("Transforming to Silver...")
silver_stream = bronze_stream.select(
    F.col("sensor_id"),
    F.col("timestamp").alias("reading_timestamp"),
    F.to_timestamp("timestamp").alias("reading_datetime"),
    F.col("sensor_type"),
    F.col("event_id"),
    
    F.col("location.lat").alias("latitude"),
    F.col("location.lon").alias("longitude"),
    F.col("location.intersection").alias("intersection"),
    F.col("location.road_type").alias("road_type"),
    F.col("location.city").alias("city"),
    F.col("location.country").alias("country"),
    
    F.col("measurements.vehicle_count").alias("vehicle_count"),
    F.col("measurements.avg_speed_mph").alias("avg_speed_mph"),
    F.col("measurements.congestion_level").alias("congestion_level"),
    F.col("measurements.pedestrian_count").alias("pedestrian_count"),
    F.col("measurements.bike_count").alias("bike_count"),
    F.col("measurements.occupancy_percent").alias("occupancy_percent"),
    F.col("measurements.queue_length_meters").alias("queue_length_meters"),
    
    F.col("traffic_flow_score"),
    F.col("incident_detected"),
    
    F.col("metadata.device_status").alias("device_status"),
    F.col("metadata.signal_strength").alias("signal_strength_dbm"),
    F.col("metadata.firmware_version").alias("firmware_version"),
    
    F.current_timestamp().alias("silver_processed_at"),
    F.col("data_source"),
    F.col("ingestion_type"),
    
    F.year(F.to_timestamp("timestamp")).alias("year"),
    F.month(F.to_timestamp("timestamp")).alias("month"),
    F.dayofmonth(F.to_timestamp("timestamp")).alias("day"),
    F.hour(F.to_timestamp("timestamp")).alias("hour")
)

# Data Quality Filtering
quality_stream = silver_stream.filter(
    (F.col("sensor_id").isNotNull()) &
    (F.col("latitude").isNotNull()) &
    (F.col("longitude").isNotNull()) &
    (F.col("latitude").between(-90, 90)) &
    (F.col("longitude").between(-180, 180)) &
    (F.col("vehicle_count").isNotNull()) &
    (F.col("vehicle_count") >= 0) &
    (F.col("avg_speed_mph").isNotNull()) &
    (F.col("avg_speed_mph") >= 0) &
    (F.col("avg_speed_mph") <= 100)
)

# Deduplication with Watermarking
deduped_stream = quality_stream \
    .withWatermark("reading_datetime", "5 minutes") \
    .dropDuplicates(["event_id"])

print("✓ Transformations configured")

# Write to Silver Layer (Parquet)
print("Starting streaming write to Silver...")
query = deduped_stream.writeStream \
    .format("parquet") \
    .option("compression", "snappy") \
    .option("checkpointLocation", CHECKPOINT_PATH) \
    .option("path", SILVER_PATH) \
    .option("spark.sql.streaming.schemaTrackingLocation", f"{CHECKPOINT_PATH}_schemas/") \
    .partitionBy("year", "month", "day", "hour") \
    .outputMode("append") \
    .trigger(processingTime="2 minutes") \
    .start()

print("✓ Streaming query started")
print(f"Query ID: {query.id}")

# Keep the job running
query.awaitTermination()

# job.commit()
# print("✓ Job completed")
